calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
